# PHASE 12.5 COPYRIGHT POLICY

## Document

`docs/product/MOGHARE360_COPYRIGHT_AND_ASSET_POLICY.md`

## Key Rules

- No third-party copyrighted assets without license
- No car brand logos without permission
- No copied website text
- No unlicensed fonts
- Owner-provided Moghareh Motors logo treated as owner asset
- Asset registry required before commercial use
- Screenshots from owned/local pages only
- Demo package: owned/generated assets only
